title: Boil Mozzarella Stir-fry
description: A tangy and juicy one-pot American dish featuring mozzarella cheese boiled until it melts into a creamy sauce.

ingredients.name: Mozzarella cheese
ingredients.notes: Ensure it's pre-cooked or fully melted

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add onions and garlic, sautéing until translucent about 3 minutes.
Include red bell peppers and continue cooking for another 5 minutes.
Pour in the shredded mozzarella cheese. Stir gently to avoid clumping.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Reduce heat to low and let the mixture simmer, stirring occasionally, until the cheese melts into a creamy sauce, about 7-10 minutes.
Serve hot as a snack or appetizer.
